action_set_definitions.name: get_market_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current market context including date, accumulated revenue, current demand multiplier, and competitor pricing levels.

action_set_definitions.name: get_inventory_snapshot
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current number of available rooms and current active price for every room category in the hotel.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_room_pricing
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the pricing for specific room categories to manage demand and revenue yield.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_simulation
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the environment to the next time period (e.g., 24 hours). This processes bookings based on current prices and updates the inventory and revenue state.

state_description.current_date: The current date in the simulation (YYYY-MM-DD format).
state_description.inventory_status: Mapping of room categories to the number of available rooms remaining for the current period.
state_description.current_pricing: The current active price for each room category.
state_description.cumulative_revenue: The total revenue earned since the start of the simulation.
state_description.market_demand_factor: A hidden multiplier (0.0 to 2.0) representing seasonal demand (e.g., 1.5 during holidays).
state_description.competitor_avg_price: The average price of similar rooms in the nearby market area.
